subtitles.original: きっと人生最後の日を前に思うのだろう
subtitles.english: I'm sure that before the final day of my life I'll think...

subtitles.original: 全部 全部言い足りなくて惜しいけど
subtitles.english: ...of how regrettable it is that I couldn't say everything, everything.

subtitles.original: あぁ いつか人生最後の日 君がいないこと
subtitles.english: Ahh, someday on the last day of my life, that you're not here...

subtitles.original: もっと もっと もっと もっと もっと
ちゃんと言って
あのね
空が青いのってどうやって
subtitles.english: ...how do I convey that the sky is blue?

subtitles.original: 伝えればいいんだろうね
夜の
雲が高いのってどうすれば
subtitles.english: ...how do I make you understand how high the clouds are?

subtitles.original: 君もわかるんだろう
subtitles.english: I wonder if you can understand too.

subtitles.original: 言って
あのね
私 実はわかってるの
もう君が逝ったこと
あのね
わからずやって言うんだろうね
忘れたいんだけど
もっとちゃんと言ってよ
忘れないようメモにしてよ
subtitles.english: Write a memo so I won't forget.

subtitles.original: 明日十時にホームで待ち合わせとかしよう
subtitles.english: Let's meet up at the train platform tomorrow at ten.

subtitles.original: 牡丹は散っても花だ
subtitles.english: Even when the peony scatters, it's still a flower.

subtitles.original: 夏が去っても追慕は切だ
subtitles.english: Even when summer passes, the yearning is deep.

subtitles.original: 口に出して
声に出して
君が言って
そして人生最後の日 君が見えるのなら
subtitles.english: And if I can see you on the last day of my life...

subtitles.original: きっと 人生最後の日も愛を歌うのだろう
subtitles.english: ...surely I'll sing of love on the last day of my life, too.

subtitles.original: 全部 全部無駄じゃなかったって言うから
subtitles.english: Because I'll say that none of it, none of it was in vain.

subtitles.original: あぁ いつか人生最後の日 君がいないことが
subtitles.english: Ahh, someday on the last day of my life, that you're not here...

subtitles.original: まだ信じられないけど
subtitles.english: ...is still hard for me to believe, but...

subtitles.original: もっと もっと もっと もっと
もっと もっと もっと 君が
もっと もっと もっと もっと
もっと
もっと もっと もっと もっと
もっと
ちゃんと言って
イェーイ！イェーイ！
Ah, thank you so much for being here, Mio-senpai, Okayu-senpai!
subtitles.english: Ah, thank you so much for being here, Mio-senpai, Okayu-senpai!

subtitles.original: イェーイ！イェーイ！
I can't believe we sang together!
subtitles.english: I can't believe we sang together!

subtitles.original: So fun!
いやいや、こちらこそありがとう！
Thank you! Thank you! Thank you!
subtitles.english: Thank you! Thank you! Thank you!

subtitles.original: 次のゲストは、みお先輩とおかゆ先輩です！
subtitles.english: The next guests are Mio-senpai and Okayu-senpai!

subtitles.original: イェーイ！ラオラ！
Happy birthday!
Thank you!
おめでとう！おめでとう！
Thank you! 来てくれてありがとうございます！
subtitles.english: Thank you! Thank you so much for coming!

subtitles.original: こちらこそ！
Why don't you introduce yourselves one more time?
subtitles.english: Why don't you introduce yourselves one more time?

subtitles.original: 自己紹介お願いします！
オッケー！
うち、うち、うちだよ！大神ミオだよ！
subtitles.english: Uchi, uchi, it's uchi! I'm Ookami Mio!

subtitles.original: ホロライブゲーマーズの大神ミオです！
subtitles.english: I'm Ookami Mio from Hololive Gamers!

subtitles.original: かわいい！そして...
はーい！
もぐもぐ、おかゆ！
ホロライブゲーマーズの猫又おかゆです！
subtitles.english: I'm Nekomata Okayu from Hololive Gamers!

subtitles.original: もぐもぐ、おかゆ！もぐもぐ、おかゆ！
subtitles.english: Mogu mogu, Okayu! Mogu mogu, Okayu!

subtitles.original: もぐもぐ、もぐもぐ
Yummy yummy! Yummy yummy!
Thank you so much! ありがとうございます！
subtitles.english: Thank you so much! Thank you very much!

subtitles.original: よし、行くぞ！
えーっと、Mio's English Challenge!
The glow writing in the concert was beautiful, wasn't it?
subtitles.english: The glow writing in the concert was beautiful, wasn't it?

responses.thoughts:
**Subtitle Transcription & Analysis: "Itte." Performance & Post-Song Banter**

Okay, so I need to create subtitles for this video clip, right? It runs from 00:00 to roughly 05:01. Let's start by breaking it down. From 00:00 to about 03:07, it's the song "Itte." by Raora Panthera, Nekomata Okayu, and Ookami Mio. I'll need to confirm those character names and make sure the spelling is right. So, we've got Ookami Mio (black hair, wolf ears), Raora Panthera (pink hair, feline ears), and Nekomata Okayu (purple hair, cat ears).

The song is "Itte." (言って。). Now, let's nail down these lyrics and timing... Okay, the singing starts right at 00:00.

*   00:00.300 - 00:04.600: "きっど人生最後の日を前に思うのだろう"  (I'm sure before the final day...)
*   00:04.600 - 00:09.100: "全部 全部言い足りなくて惜しいけど"  (...regrettable that I...)
*   00:09.400 - 00:15.500: "あぁ いつか人生最後の日 君がいないこと"  (...someday, you're not here)
*   00:15.600 - 00:19.400: "もっと もっと もっと もっと"  (More, more, more...)
*   00:19.600 - 00:22.200: "もっと"  (More)
*   00:22.600 - 00:24.400: "ちゃんと言って" (Tell me properly)

Instrumental from 00:24.400 to 00:45.000. Now for the vocals again:

*   00:45.300 - 00:47.300: "あのね" (You know...)
*   00:47.400 - 00:51.300: "空が青いのってどうやって" (How to say the sky is blue?)
*   00:51.300 - 00:55.700: "伝えればいいんだろうね" (How should I say it?)
*   00:55.900 - 00:58.200: "夜の" (The night...)
*   00:58.200 - 01:02.100: "雲が高いのってどうすれば" (The clouds are high...)
*   01:02.100 - 01:06.100: "君もわかるんだろう" (Can you understand?)
*   01:06.200 - 01:07.500: "言って" (Tell me)

Instrumental from 01:07.500 to 01:28.000. Back to singing:

*   01:28.000 - 01:29.800: "あのね" (You know...)
*   01:29.800 - 01:33.400: "私 実はわかってるの" (I already know...)
*   01:33.400 - 01:38.200: "もう君が逝ったこと" (You're already gone)
*   01:38.200 - 01:40.000: "あのね" (You know...)
*   01:40.000 - 01:44.800: "わからずやって言うんだろうね" (You'll say I'm stubborn...)
*   01:44.800 - 01:48.300: "忘れたいんだけど" (Though I want to forget)
*   01:49.300 - 01:52.500: "もっとちゃんと言ってよ" (Tell me properly)
*   01:52.500 - 01
